commit.message: feat: surface dashboard UI link on PR reviews [INF-0000] (#1440)

findings.evidence: Rules present: ci-secret-reference, ci-write-permission. Findings=2, paths=2, controls=4.
findings.remediation: Review workflow secrets and use least-privilege permissions before allowing agent automation.
findings.summary: open-swe finished with permit status needs review. 2 findings, 2 graph paths, and 4 controls were checked.
findings.title: open-swe needs review: ci-secret-reference, ci-write-permission

findings.remediation: Review workflow secrets and use least-privilege permissions before allowing agent automation.

findings.evidence: Rules present: ci-pr-target-write-token, ci-pull-request-target, ci-secret-reference, ci-write-permission. Findings=84, paths=22, controls=105.
findings.remediation: Split trusted CI from untrusted pull request handling and downgrade token permissions before agent execution.

findings.title: mcp-use blocked: ci-pr-target-write-token, ci-pull-request-target

findings.evidence: No expected risk rules present. Findings=0, paths=0, controls=0.
findings.remediation: Keep scanner and Deep Agent citation checks in CI to preserve this approval state.

findings.title: lightagent passed without deterministic findings
